home.title: Full stack MEAN developer.
home.subtitle: "A programmer who writes clean code perfectly understands the problem before writing the code".

sectionTwo.description: I'm Guillermo Piñate, full stack developer (Angular/Node.js) with a solid creative foundation thanks to my previous experience in design and photography. Technology is my driving force, and I like to build functional, clean and visually polished products.

job1.title: Frontend Developer
job1.description: As a Frontend Developer I work on a project for Iberdrola regarding the creation of service orders. Angular version 16, Angular Material.

job2.title: Frontend Developer
job2.description: As a Frontend Developer I work on a construction materials and tools management project. As a development framework I use Angular Version 15, Angular Material, Prime NG, PrimeFLEX, REDUX-NGRX.
tasks: Implementation of product and user CRUD.

job3.title: Full stack Developer
job3.description: As a Frontend Developer I worked on applications and apps for conferences including events such as book fairs and The Auto Show. The tools I used were Angular version 8 to 14, Ionic version 6, Angular Material, Prime Ng, Bootstrap, ASANA for issue management.
tasks: Change fetch requests based on promises to requests based on reactive programming Observables Rxjs
Consumed REST services, JWT, role management, chats, file upload.
Implementation of i18n for different languages.
Maintenance to Legacy Ionic components version 5 to version 6.
Maintenance of existing functionalities and development of new functionalities.
Creation of the company landing page.

job4.title: Frontend Developer
tasks: Design and implementation of user interfaces.
Implementation of product and user CRUD.

list.title: NetTask
list.subtitle: Angular, Node
list.description: It is a web application to organize tasks, you can assign a task to a user, change the status and add tags. It consumes REST services, Node, Express, JWT, CRUD, work with interceptors, Pipes, reactive forms.

list.title: Woutick Show
list.subtitle: Angular, Ionic
list.description: It is a web or an app for concert halls, cultural agendas, conferences or communities. It is developed in Angular Ionic, consumes REST services and i18n for English, Spanish and Portuguese languages

list.title: Woutick Landing Page
list.subtitle: Angular, Ionic
list.description: This project serves as a showcase to learn about all the products offered by the company. It is developed in Angular Ionic, consumes REST services and i18n for English, Spanish and Portuguese languages

list.title: Heroes of the storm
list.subtitle: Angular, Express, Node, Mongo
list.description: Heroes Of the Storm was one of the projects I developed as part of my training in the web development Boot camp, The css is totally flat without predesigned components, JWT, character CRUD

list.title: AdminPro
list.subtitle: Angular, Express, Node, Mongo
list.description: As part of my self-training, and in pursuit of constant improvement, I took the Advanced Angular course, AdminPro is a web that I developed throughout the course, authentication, CRUD of doctors and hospitals

list.title: Pipes App
list.subtitle: Angular
list.description: Pipes app is a project that I developed in order to strengthen knowledge about Pipes in Angular. Angular Material concepts are also applied for a more interactive design
